Tagline: A genre-defying artist blending hip-hop, jazz, and soul with a bold, experimental edge.
Bio: Tyler, The Creator is an American rapper, producer, and songwriter known for his innovative approach to hip-hop, blending elements of jazz, soul, and alternative music. A founding member of the Odd Future collective, he has won multiple Grammy Awards and gained critical acclaim for albums like 'IGOR' and 'Call Me If You Get Lost.'
AI Summary: Tyler, The Creator's music is a boundary-pushing fusion of hip-hop, jazz, and soul, characterized by introspective lyrics, bold production choices, and a distinctive artistic vision. His evolution from Odd Future's provocative leader to a Grammy-winning solo artist highlights his growth and versatility.
Festival Bio (NL): Van alle leden van het nooit officieel opgeheven, fluïde hiphopgezelschap Odd Future, uit de krochten van L.A., is Tyler, The Creator onbetwist het succesvolst en invloedrijkst. Daar doet de aan de lopende band megabanging albums uitbrengende Californiër dan ook de nodige moeite voor, als multitasker die zijn artiestennaam eer aandoet, want behalve als rapper is hij ook actief als producer, modeontwerper en acteur. Bovendien ontpopt Tyler zich steeds meer als zanger, en komen al zijn talent en creativiteit samen in slim uitgedachte spektakelshows.
Festival Bio (EN): Of all the members of the never officially disbanded, fluid hip-hop collective Odd Future from the depths of L.A., Tyler, The Creator is unquestionably the most successful and influential. The Californian, who consistently releases mega-banging albums, puts in considerable effort to earn that title as a multitasker living up to his artist name. In addition to being a rapper, he is also active as a producer, fashion designer, and actor. Moreover, Tyler is increasingly emerging as a singer, with all his talent and creativity converging in cleverly conceived spectacle shows.

Tagline: New Zealand's alt-pop prodigy blending introspection with chart-topping hooks.
Bio: Lorde is a Grammy-winning singer-songwriter from New Zealand known for her introspective lyrics, minimalist production, and unique vocal style. She gained international fame with her debut single 'Royals' and has since released critically acclaimed albums such as 'Pure Heroine' and 'Melodrama.'
AI Summary: Lorde's music is characterized by its minimalist production, introspective and poetic lyrics, and her distinctive, emotive vocal delivery. Her ability to blend alternative pop with mainstream appeal has earned her critical acclaim and a devoted global following.
Festival Bio (NL): Kwaliteit gaat bij Lorde boven kwantiteit, een punctuele artiest bovendien: zoals gebruikelijk precies vier jaar na haar vorige album verscheen in juni 2025 weer een verse plaat van de Nieuw-Zeelandse singer-songwriter, het in een opvallende röntgenhoes gestoken ‘Virgin’. Een terugkeer naar de alt-pop waarmee ze doorbrak, elektronischer dan voorheen, maar poëtisch als altijd en weer een daverend succes. Afgaande op de bijbehorende Ultrasound Tour, die in november al een dolenthousiaste Afas Live aandeed, steekt Lorde ook onstage in topvorm. Doe maar diep buigen voor deze poproyal.
Festival Bio (EN): Quality takes precedence over quantity for Lorde, a punctual artist to boot: as usual, exactly four years after her previous album, the New Zealand singer-songwriter released a fresh record in June 2025, the strikingly X-ray-covered ‘Virgin’. A return to the alt-pop that brought her fame, more electronic than before, yet as poetic as ever and once again a resounding success. Judging by the accompanying Ultrasound Tour, which already thrilled a wildly enthusiastic Afas Live in November, Lorde is also in top form on stage. Bow deeply for this pop royal.

Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] The wave that came from Schiermonnikoog in 2015 blew many people away. A group of young – then still unknown – musicians had gathered there to make music. That album completely transformed Dutch hip-hop. The younger generation not only shattered the proverbial windows of old-school hip-hop, but more importantly, they introduced a new style with new names and a new audience. New Wave was, in every sense, the new generation, a wave so powerful that you can still ride it ten years later.
Festival Bio (NL): De golf die in 2015 van Schiermonnikoog afkwam heeft heel wat mensen omvergeblazen. Daar had zich een groep jonge – toen nog onbekende – muzikanten verzameld om muziek te maken. Dat album veranderde de Nederlandse hiphop compleet. De jonge garde gooide niet alleen de spreekwoordelijke ruiten in van de oude hiphop, veel belangrijker was hun nieuwe stijl met bijbehorende nieuwe namen en een nieuw publiek. New Wave was in alles de nieuwe lichting, een golf zo sterk dat je er tien jaar later nog op kunt surfen.
Festival Bio (EN): The wave that came from Schiermonnikoog in 2015 blew many people away. A group of young – then still unknown – musicians had gathered there to make music. That album completely transformed Dutch hip-hop. The younger generation not only shattered the proverbial windows of old-school hip-hop, but more importantly, they introduced a new style with new names and a new audience. New Wave was, in every sense, the new generation, a wave so powerful that you can still ride it ten years later.

Tagline: Fusing retro funk, disco, and modern pop into a sleek and infectious sound.
Bio: Parcels is a five-piece band from Australia known for their unique blend of funk, disco, and indie pop. They gained international attention with their collaboration with Daft Punk on the single 'Overnight' and have since released critically acclaimed albums showcasing their retro-inspired yet contemporary sound.
AI Summary: Parcels masterfully combine the groove of 70s disco and funk with modern indie pop sensibilities, creating a polished and danceable sound. Their collaboration with Daft Punk and their dynamic live performances have cemented their reputation as a standout act in the indie music scene.
Festival Bio (NL): Altijd leuk, pakketjes! Wat deze vanuit Berlijn opererende Australiërs dan hebben ingepakt? Vooral veel lekkers waarmee je op festivals uitstekend kunt uitpakken:(nu-)disco, electropop, neosoul, synthpop, softrock. Net als Daft Punk, dat Parcels na de verhuizing op sleeptouw nam, heeft het kwieke kwintet een voorliefde voor vette en stuiterende baslijnen, filmische strijkers, retro synthesizers, funkgitaren, jazzy toetsen en vocale harmonieën. ‘Leaveyourlove’ (aan spaties doen ze niet) is geschreven tijdens een zonsondergang, en zo klinkt Parcels eigenlijk altijd: kleurrijk en vol pracht, met een vleugje melancholie.
Festival Bio (EN): Always fun, packages! So what have these Berlin-based Australians packed? Lots of treats perfect for making a splash at festivals: (nu-)disco, electropop, neosoul, synthpop, soft rock. Just like Daft Punk, who took Parcels under their wing after their move, this lively quintet has a fondness for fat, bouncing basslines, cinematic strings, retro synthesizers, funk guitars, jazzy keys, and vocal harmonies. 'Leaveyourlove' (they're not big on spaces) was written during a sunset, and that's exactly how Parcels always sounds: colorful and full of splendor, with a touch of melancholy.

Tagline: Turning unrequited longing and heartbreak into glittering indie pop anthems.
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Anyone know a better way to process unrequited longing and heartbreak than with colossal hooks, bittersweet sing-along melodies, and glittering grooves? No, exactly. New Yorker Shane Boose, better known as SOMBR, has turned it into an art form. His sharply written indie pop songs have literally evolved from bedroom creations into stadium productions, complete with theatrical supershows. And if you still don’t know those soulfully rocking hits like ‘12 to 12’ and ‘back to friends’ – how is that even possible?! – soon enough, you’ll know them by heart and feel them in your hips.
AI Summary: SOMBR, the moniker of New York-based artist Shane Boose, crafts emotionally resonant indie pop with a focus on colossal hooks, bittersweet melodies, and danceable grooves. His evolution from bedroom productions to theatrical stadium shows highlights his ability to connect with audiences on both an intimate and grand scale. Tracks like '12 to 12' and 'back to friends' showcase his knack for blending heartfelt lyrics with infectious rhythms.
Festival Bio (NL): Iemand een betere manier om onbeantwoord verlangen en liefdesverdriet te verwerken dan met kolossale hooks, bitterzoete meezingbare melodieën en glitterende grooves? Nee, precies. De New Yorkse Shane Boose, beter bekend als SOMBR, maakte er een kunst van. En zo ontpopten zijn scherp geschreven indiepopsongs zich letterlijk van slaapkamercreaties tot stadionproducties, inclusief theatrale supershows. En mocht je die soulvol rockende hits als ‘12 to 12’ en ‘back to friends’ nu nog steeds niet kennen – hoe dan?! – straks ken je ze sowieso uit je hoofd én heupen.
Festival Bio (EN): Anyone know a better way to process unrequited longing and heartbreak than with colossal hooks, bittersweet sing-along melodies, and glittering grooves? No, exactly. New Yorker Shane Boose, better known as SOMBR, has turned it into an art form. His sharply written indie pop songs have literally evolved from bedroom creations into stadium productions, complete with theatrical supershows. And if you still don’t know those soulfully rocking hits like ‘12 to 12’ and ‘back to friends’ – how is that even possible?! – soon enough, you’ll know them by heart and feel them in your hips.

Tagline: Blending hardcore punk with infectious grooves and experimental flair, TURNSTILE redefines modern punk.
Bio: TURNSTILE is a Baltimore-based band known for their innovative approach to hardcore punk, incorporating elements of groove, melody, and experimentation. Their critically acclaimed 2021 album 'GLOW ON' has solidified their reputation as one of the most exciting acts in contemporary punk music.
AI Summary: TURNSTILE's fusion of hardcore punk with melodic and experimental elements has earned them critical acclaim and a devoted fanbase. Their energetic live performances and genre-defying sound make them a standout in modern punk.
Festival Bio (NL): NEVER ENOUGH.
Festival Bio (EN): NEVER ENOUGH.

Tagline: A groundbreaking force in hyperpop blending club, pop, hip-hop, and emo influences.
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] In every corner of the internet, 21-year-old American rapper and producer 2hollis is being hailed as a messiah. Hollis Parker Frazier-Herndon is truly unique in his eclectic mix of club, pop, hip-hop, and emo. You can hear the tender bangers of Bladee and Yung Lean, the autotune experiments of Ye, and the party mindset of Charli XCX reflected in his self-composed music. Yet, 2hollis is much more than just a list of trendy influences. This is raw, authentic hyperpop: groundbreaking in sound, made for a massive audience.
AI Summary: 2hollis crafts a unique and authentic hyperpop sound that merges the emotional depth of emo, the high-energy beats of club music, and the experimental autotune stylings of Ye. Drawing inspiration from artists like Bladee, Yung Lean, and Charli XCX, his music is both innovative and accessible, appealing to a wide audience while pushing genre boundaries.
Festival Bio (NL): Tot in alle uithoeken van het internet wordt de 21-jarige Amerikaanse rapper en producer 2hollis ontvangen als een messias. Hollis Parker Frazier-Herndon is immers uniek in zijn eclectische mix van club, pop, hiphop en emo. Je hoort de teergevoelige bangers van Bladee en Yung Lean, de autotune-experimenten van Ye en de party mindset van Charli xcx terug in zijn zelf gecomponeerde muziek. Al is 2hollis veel meer dan een opsomming van hippe invloeden. Dit is rauwe, authentieke hyperpop: vooruitstrevend in geluid, gemaakt voor een megapubliek.
Festival Bio (EN): In every corner of the internet, 21-year-old American rapper and producer 2hollis is being hailed as a messiah. Hollis Parker Frazier-Herndon is truly unique in his eclectic mix of club, pop, hip-hop, and emo. You can hear the tender bangers of Bladee and Yung Lean, the autotune experiments of Ye, and the party mindset of Charli XCX reflected in his self-composed music. Yet, 2hollis is much more than just a list of trendy influences. This is raw, authentic hyperpop: groundbreaking in sound, made for a massive audience.

Tagline: High-energy Australian punk rockers blending raw energy with a modern edge.
Bio: Amyl and The Sniffers are a Melbourne-based punk rock band known for their explosive live performances and raw, high-octane sound. Their self-titled debut album won the 2019 ARIA Award for Best Rock Album, and they have gained international acclaim for their unapologetic lyrics and charismatic frontwoman, Amy Taylor.
AI Summary: Amyl and The Sniffers deliver a ferocious blend of punk and garage rock, characterized by blistering guitar riffs, relentless energy, and Amy Taylor's commanding vocal presence. Their music captures the raw spirit of classic punk while injecting a modern, rebellious attitude.
Festival Bio (NL): Boos zijn over onrechtvaardigheid, maar wel de lol van het leven inzien: dat is in een circle pit de invalshoek van Amyl and The Sniffers. De punkrockers uit Melbourne steken een vrolijke middelvinger op naar seksisme, kapitalisme en al die andere -ismen waar we vanaf moeten. Amy Taylor en haar mates namen hun derde album ‘Cartoon Darkness’ op in Studio 606, het rockwalhalla van fan Dave Grohl. In augustus komt de boodschap op die plaat tot leven tijdens dé Flevopolderparty: beleef plezier aan je woede!
Festival Bio (EN): Being angry about injustice, yet still seeing the fun in life: that's the approach of Amyl and The Sniffers in a circle pit. The punk rockers from Melbourne cheerfully flip the bird to sexism, capitalism, and all those other -isms we need to get rid of. Amy Taylor and her mates recorded their third album, 'Cartoon Darkness,' at Studio 606, the rock haven of fan Dave Grohl. In August, the message of that record comes to life during the ultimate Flevopolder party: find joy in your rage!

Tagline: Dutch pop sensation blending catchy melodies with contemporary beats.
Bio: Antoon is a Dutch singer, rapper, and producer known for his infectious pop and rap tracks. He gained significant popularity with hits like 'Hyperventilatie' and 'Vluchtstrook', becoming one of the rising stars in the Dutch music scene.
AI Summary: Antoon's music combines modern pop sensibilities with rap influences, creating an accessible yet dynamic sound that resonates with younger audiences. His ability to craft catchy hooks and relatable lyrics has propelled him to the forefront of the Dutch music charts.
Festival Bio (NL): Antoon sprak begin 2026 de wens uit Lowlands in de fik te zetten. Gaat hem zeker lukken, want het streamingkanon stapelt de successen opeen: uitverkochte shows, prijzen, records. Hoe de jongste student aan de Herman Brood Academie ooit dat flikt? Simpel: hij is een allround popster, die begrijpt dat alles valt of staat met pakkende nummers over liefde, kapotgaan en weer opkrabbelen. Soms met een scherp randje hiphop en attitude, soms elektronisch en dansbaar, soms gevoelig. Antoon zet zijn dromen niet meer aan de kant.
Festival Bio (EN): At the beginning of 2026, Antoon expressed his wish to set Lowlands on fire. He’s bound to succeed, as the streaming powerhouse keeps stacking up successes: sold-out shows, awards, records. How does the youngest student ever at the Herman Brood Academy pull it off? Simple: he’s an all-around pop star who understands that everything hinges on catchy songs about love, falling apart, and getting back up again. Sometimes with a sharp edge of hip-hop and attitude, sometimes electronic and danceable, sometimes emotional. Antoon no longer puts his dreams on hold.

Tagline: A genre-defying artist blending R&B, funk, and indie pop with introspective lyricism.
Bio: Blood Orange is the moniker of British musician Devonté Hynes, known for his innovative blend of R&B, funk, and indie pop. He has garnered critical acclaim for his introspective lyrics, lush production, and collaborations with artists like Solange, FKA twigs, and Carly Rae Jepsen.
AI Summary: Blood Orange crafts a unique sound that merges smooth R&B grooves with experimental indie pop and funk influences. His ability to seamlessly blend genres, paired with his poignant and personal songwriting, has earned him widespread critical acclaim and a reputation as a boundary-pushing artist.
Festival Bio (NL): Staat er geen samenwerking met grootheden als Florence Welch, A$AP Rocky, Alex Turner of FKA twigs in de agenda, dan verpakt multi-instrumentalist Dev Hynes zijn songwriterfantasie in Blood Orange: R&B meets indie meets warme synthpop. À la Prince dus, maar dan aangevuld met eeuwenoude accenten van Strauss en Bach. In aanloop naar het in 2025 verschenen album ʻEssex Honeyʼ kende de Londenaar een rouwperiode, die hij op zijn kenmerkende orkestrale wijze van zich af musiceert. Live komt dat allemaal even hard als engelachtig binnen.
Festival Bio (EN): If there’s no collaboration with greats like Florence Welch, A$AP Rocky, Alex Turner, or FKA twigs on the agenda, multi-instrumentalist Dev Hynes channels his songwriting fantasies into Blood Orange: R&B meets indie meets warm synth-pop. In the style of Prince, but enriched with timeless accents from Strauss and Bach. Leading up to the 2025 release of the album ‘Essex Honey,’ the Londoner experienced a period of mourning, which he processes in his signature orchestral style. Live, it all hits as powerfully as it does angelically.

Tagline: Trailblazing hip-hop duo blending sharp lyricism with innovative production.
Bio: Clipse is a critically acclaimed hip-hop duo from Virginia Beach, USA, consisting of brothers Pusha T and No Malice. Known for their intricate lyricism and collaborations with The Neptunes, they gained widespread recognition with albums like 'Lord Willin'' and 'Hell Hath No Fury,' which are considered classics in the genre.
AI Summary: Clipse is celebrated for their gritty, streetwise lyricism and groundbreaking production, often crafted by The Neptunes. Their music combines vivid storytelling with minimalist, hard-hitting beats, making them one of the most influential duos in hip-hop history.
Festival Bio (NL): Het was een uitgemaakte zaak in de jaarlijstjes: het beste hiphopalbum in 2025 was van Clipse, ‘Let God Sort Em Out’. Maar zelfs het eerste oordeel was overduidelijk. Op Pusha T en Malice zit geen enkele sleet. Met producties van Pharrell en gasten als Kendrick, Tyler en Nas is de tijdloze en pure hiphop weer terug. In 2023 gaf Pusha T een volle Bravo al een fikse beuk met een onvergetelijk optreden. Nu hij zijn broer meeneemt uit Virginia wordt het meer dan twee keer zo goed.
Festival Bio (EN): It was a foregone conclusion in the year-end lists: the best hip-hop album of 2025 was by Clipse, ‘Let God Sort Em Out’. But even the initial verdict was crystal clear. Pusha T and Malice haven’t lost a step. With productions by Pharrell and guest appearances from Kendrick, Tyler, and Nas, timeless and pure hip-hop is back. In 2023, Pusha T already delivered a powerful blow to a packed Bravo with an unforgettable performance. Now that he’s bringing his brother from Virginia along, it’s going to be more than twice as good.

Tagline: A genre-defying artist blending R&B, folk, and experimental sounds into deeply personal music.
Bio: Dijon is an American singer-songwriter known for his raw, emotive vocal style and innovative blending of R&B, folk, and experimental elements. His debut album 'Absolutely' received critical acclaim for its intimate storytelling and genre-bending production.
AI Summary: Dijon's music stands out for its heartfelt lyricism and unique fusion of R&B, folk, and experimental sounds, creating an intimate and immersive listening experience. His debut album 'Absolutely' has been praised for its vulnerability and innovative approach to songwriting.
Festival Bio (NL): Onlangs zette hij nog Paradiso op stelten: de vanuit het zonnige L.A. opererende singer-songwriter Dijon. Schepper van linksdraaiende R&B, met een frasering waarin je nog altijd zijn verleden als rapper terughoort, en een voorliefde voor Prince, samples en zijn pasgeboren zoontje, aan wie zijn recente tweede album ‘Baby’ is opgedragen. Samenwerken doet de dertiger ook graag, onder meer als producer, voor popsterren als Charli xcx en Justin Bieber. Maar ook voor indiecollega’s Bon Iver en Mk.gee, die zelf regelmatig opduiken in Dijons band. Cirkel rond.
Festival Bio (EN): Recently, he brought the house down at Paradiso: the Los Angeles-based singer-songwriter Dijon. Creator of offbeat R&B, with phrasing that still hints at his past as a rapper, and a love for Prince, samples, and his newborn son, to whom his recent second album ‘Baby’ is dedicated. The thirty-something also enjoys collaborating, working as a producer for pop stars like Charli XCX and Justin Bieber. But also for indie peers Bon Iver and Mk.gee, who often appear in Dijon's band themselves. Full circle.

Tagline: Dutch singer-songwriter blending dreamy pop with electronic and atmospheric elements.
Bio: Eefje de Visser is a Dutch artist known for her ethereal blend of dream pop and electronic music, characterized by poetic lyrics in her native language and immersive soundscapes. She has gained critical acclaim for her innovative approach to modern pop and her captivating live performances.
AI Summary: Eefje de Visser's music combines poetic Dutch lyrics with dreamy electronic textures and atmospheric pop arrangements, creating an immersive and introspective sound. Her critically acclaimed albums and mesmerizing live shows have established her as a standout artist in the European music scene.
Festival Bio (NL): Eefje de Visser maakt al dik vijftien jaar deel uit van het Nederlandse muzieklandschap en torent daar zo bitterzoetjes aan bovenuit. Deze winnaar van onder meer de Grote Prijs van Nederland (2009) en twee Edisons (2021) flikt het om met haar delicate indiepop twee zaken tegelijk klaar te spelen: de singer-songwriter is zowel heerlijk ondoorgrondelijk als direct herkenbaar. Het herkenbare zit ’m in de kalme synthesizers, gelaagde vocalen en introverte poëzie. En het ondoorgrondelijke in de dromerige sound, die je geleidelijk bij de kladden grijpt.
Festival Bio (EN): Eefje de Visser has been a part of the Dutch music scene for over fifteen years and has gradually risen above it with a bittersweet charm. This winner of the Grote Prijs van Nederland (2009) and two Edisons (2021) manages to achieve two things simultaneously with her delicate indie pop: the singer-songwriter is both wonderfully enigmatic and instantly recognizable. The recognizable lies in the calm synthesizers, layered vocals, and introspective poetry. The enigmatic resides in the dreamy sound that gradually takes hold of you.

Tagline: Brooklyn's Geese fuse post-punk energy with experimental rock to craft a raw and dynamic sound.
Bio: Geese is a five-piece band from Brooklyn, New York, known for their high-energy post-punk sound infused with experimental and progressive rock elements. Their debut album 'Projector' received critical acclaim for its intricate instrumentation and youthful intensity.
AI Summary: Geese delivers a refreshing take on post-punk by blending angular guitar riffs, driving rhythms, and experimental textures. Their debut album 'Projector' showcases a mix of raw energy and technical prowess, earning them recognition as one of the most exciting new bands in the indie rock scene.
Festival Bio (NL): Van Modest Mouse-manie tot Radiohead-stijl vocalen en van Led Zep-psychedelica tot demonenuitdrijving à la Nick Cave: het vierde Geese-album ‘Getting Killed’ is zo smakenrijk als muziek maar kan zijn. Ook bij liveoptredens staat het publiek van het New Yorkse indierockgezelschap met open mond van verbazing. Als er ruimte is voor die emotie, want terwijl je wordt bedwelmd door de stem van de enigmatische frontman Cameron Winter, neemt een nummer de afslag naar Onverwachtland of Spannendhuizen – net toen je dacht te weten waar het naartoe ging.
Festival Bio (EN): From Modest Mouse mania to Radiohead-style vocals, and from Led Zep psychedelia to demon exorcisms à la Nick Cave: the fourth Geese album, ‘Getting Killed,’ is as flavorful as music can get. During live performances, the audience of the New York indie rock ensemble stands in awe, mouths agape. That is, if there's room for such an emotion, because just as you're being mesmerized by the voice of enigmatic frontman Cameron Winter, a song takes a turn toward the unexpected or thrilling—right when you thought you knew where it was heading.

Tagline: A mesmerizing blend of Latin American guitar traditions and cinematic soundscapes.
Bio: Hermanos Gutiérrez is a Swiss-Ecuadorian duo composed of brothers Alejandro and Estevan Gutiérrez, known for their evocative instrumental music that draws from Latin American traditions and cinematic influences. Their music, characterized by intricate guitar work and atmospheric arrangements, has earned them critical acclaim and a growing international audience.
AI Summary: Hermanos Gutiérrez craft a unique and immersive sound that combines the warmth of Latin American guitar styles with a cinematic, almost nostalgic atmosphere. Their music evokes imagery of desert landscapes and timeless journeys, making them a standout act in the instrumental genre.
Festival Bio (NL): Met je broer in een band, da’s vaak hommeles. Maar niet bij Hermanos Gutiérrez, oftewel de Ecuadoriaans-Zwitserse gitaristen Alejandro en Estevan Gutiérrez. Als het snaarverslaafde duo al duels uitvecht, dan is het met hun geliefde instrument. Daaruit toveren ze relaxte, psychedelische en meditatieve klanktapijten, ondersteund door wat scheutjes bongo en maraka. En sinds Dan Auerbach (The Black Keys) hun producer is ook wat strijkers. Tokkelen, plukken, strijken, akoestisch of met wah-wahpedaal, met snelle loopjes of langgerekte vegen: laat de gitaarbroers maar over de snaren glijden.
Festival Bio (EN): Being in a band with your brother often leads to trouble. But not for Hermanos Gutiérrez, the Ecuadorian-Swiss guitarists Alejandro and Estevan Gutiérrez. If this string-addicted duo ever duels, it's with their beloved instruments. From them, they conjure relaxed, psychedelic, and meditative soundscapes, supported by touches of bongos and maracas. And since Dan Auerbach (The Black Keys) became their producer, even some strings have been added. Strumming, plucking, bowing, acoustic or with a wah-wah pedal, with rapid runs or elongated sweeps: let the guitar brothers glide over the strings.

Tagline: Irish hip-hop trio blending sharp political commentary with humor and bilingual lyrics.
Bio: Kneecap is a Belfast-based hip-hop group known for their bilingual lyrics in Irish and English, combining humor, political activism, and sharp social commentary. Their energetic performances and witty, provocative songs have earned them a dedicated following.
AI Summary: Kneecap's innovative fusion of Irish and English lyrics, paired with their politically charged and satirical themes, has made them a standout act in the hip-hop scene. Their unique approach to language and culture, coupled with their dynamic live shows, has drawn critical acclaim.
Festival Bio (NL): Was er een band waar het in 2025 meer over ging dan Kneecap?! Maar ja, wat wil je als je vocaal zo sterk en uitgesproken bent? Iedereen had het over Mo Chara, Móglaí Bap en DJ Próvaí. Tussen alle rechtszaken en ander gedoe door pennen ze het ene na het andere nieuwe nummer. Hun optredens zijn om door een Belfasts ringetje te halen. Hoe groter de tegenwerking, hoe sterker hun wil. Zet straks maar een grote cirkel om het tijdslot van deze Ierse bak energie.
Festival Bio (EN): Was there a band that got more attention in 2025 than Kneecap?! But of course, what do you expect when you're so vocally strong and outspoken? Everyone was talking about Mo Chara, Móglaí Bap, and DJ Próvaí. Amid all the lawsuits and other drama, they kept churning out one new track after another. Their performances are flawless, a true Belfast gem. The greater the resistance, the stronger their determination. Make sure to mark your calendar for this Irish powerhouse of energy.

Tagline: Pioneers of global dance music blending electronic, reggae, and dancehall influences.
Bio: Major Lazer is an electronic music trio founded by Diplo, known for their genre-blending sound that incorporates elements of dancehall, reggae, and electronic music. They have achieved global success with hits like 'Lean On' and 'Cold Water,' collaborating with artists such as MØ, Justin Bieber, and DJ Snake.
AI Summary: Major Lazer's innovative fusion of dancehall, reggae, and electronic beats has made them a global phenomenon. Their ability to collaborate with diverse artists and produce infectious, high-energy tracks has cemented their place as one of the most influential acts in modern dance music.
Festival Bio (NL): Wie zin heeft in een wereldreis zonder de Lowlandse feestgronden te verlaten, meldt zich onverwijld bij het optreden van Major Lazer, het van monsterhits als ‘Lean On’ en ‘Cold Water’ bekende project van producer Diplo uit L.A., wiens muzikale trektocht geen grenzen kent. Vooral rijkelijk puttend uit de Cariben, van soca tot reggaeton en van dancehall tot rocksteady. Even makkelijk dwalen Diplo & co af naar house, hiphop of afrobeats. Als het maar zonnig klinkt, hoog in de energie zit en de dansheupen soepel houdt!
Festival Bio (EN): Anyone craving a world tour without leaving the Lowlands festival grounds should head straight to the performance by Major Lazer, the project of L.A. producer Diplo, known for monster hits like 'Lean On' and 'Cold Water,' whose musical journey knows no bounds. Drawing richly from the Caribbean, from soca to reggaeton and from dancehall to rocksteady. Just as effortlessly, Diplo & co venture into house, hip-hop, or afrobeats. As long as it sounds sunny, is high-energy, and keeps the dancing hips loose!

Tagline: Blending soulful electronica with organic instrumentation for a lush, emotive soundscape.
Bio: Maribou State is a British electronic music duo known for their fusion of downtempo beats, soulful melodies, and organic instrumentation. They have released critically acclaimed albums such as 'Portraits' and 'Kingdoms in Colour' and are celebrated for their atmospheric sound and live performances.
AI Summary: Maribou State masterfully combines electronic production with live instrumentation, creating a rich, emotive sound that draws from soul, funk, and global influences. Their albums have been praised for their intricate textures and cinematic quality, making them a standout act in the electronic music scene.
Festival Bio (NL): Wie op zoek is naar melancholie én euforie zit gebeiteld bij de fijnbesnaarde muziek van het elektronische indiepopduo Maribou State. Warmbloedige muziek waarin downtempo, triphop en een flinke scheut soul tikkertje spelen, bijeengedreven door gloedvolle melodieën, inmiddels drie albums vol. Live dijen de Londenaren uit tot een vijfkoppige band, inclusief sprookjeszangeres en naar believen uitgebreid met strijkje, koor, dansers (zoals op Glastonbury vorig jaar) en/of compleet orkest. Werkelijk niets wordt nagelaten om je in een staat van opperste gelukzaligheid te brengen.
Festival Bio (EN): Those seeking both melancholy and euphoria will find themselves perfectly catered to by the finely tuned music of the electronic indie-pop duo Maribou State. Warm-blooded music where downtempo, trip-hop, and a generous dash of soul play tag, all driven by glowing melodies, now spanning three albums. Live, the Londoners expand into a five-piece band, complete with a fairy-tale vocalist and optionally enhanced with a string section, choir, dancers (as seen at Glastonbury last year), and/or a full orchestra. Absolutely nothing is spared to bring you to a state of ultimate bliss.

Tagline: Trailblazing producer and vocalist blending jungle, drum and bass, and soulful melodies.
Bio: Nia Archives is a UK-based producer, vocalist, and DJ known for her innovative blend of jungle and drum and bass with soulful, introspective lyrics. She has gained critical acclaim for her fresh take on the genre and her ability to merge nostalgic sounds with modern production.
AI Summary: Nia Archives revitalizes jungle and drum and bass with a contemporary twist, incorporating soulful vocals and introspective themes. Her music resonates with both fans of classic rave culture and modern electronic enthusiasts, making her a standout in the electronic music scene.
Festival Bio (NL): Als derde generatie Britse Jamaicaanse groeit Dehaney Nia Lishahn Hunt op in een muzikaal nest: haar familie bestiert een studio, radiostation en sound system vol dance en gospel. Uit huis, zestien lentes pas, timmert de creatieveling aan haar dj/producer-loopbaan, met een fonkelend zangtalent als meerwaarde. Na zelf gelanceerde releases en openingsshows voor Beyoncé volgt de welverdiende doorbraak. Nieuwe junglebanger ʻMaia Maiaʼ en album ʻSilence Is Loudʼ verstevigen die sterrenstatus en typerende, machtige sound waarop Lowlands in 2023 al stuiterde. Welkom terug in Biddinghuizen, Nia Archives!
Festival Bio (EN): As a third-generation British Jamaican, Dehaney Nia Lishahn Hunt grows up in a musical household: her family runs a studio, radio station, and sound system filled with dance and gospel. Leaving home at just sixteen, the creative talent begins building her career as a DJ/producer, with a sparkling vocal talent as an added bonus. After self-released tracks and opening shows for Beyoncé, her well-deserved breakthrough follows. New jungle banger 'Maia Maia' and the album 'Silence Is Loud' solidify her star status and distinctive, powerful sound that had Lowlands bouncing in 2023. Welcome back to Biddinghuizen, Nia Archives!

Tagline: A leading Dutch orchestra renowned for its dynamic performances and diverse repertoire.
Bio: The Noord Nederlands Orkest (NNO) is one of the oldest and most prominent orchestras in the Netherlands, known for its performances of classical and contemporary works. Based in Groningen, the orchestra collaborates with renowned conductors and soloists, offering a wide range of symphonic music to audiences across the northern Netherlands.
AI Summary: The Noord Nederlands Orkest excels in delivering both classical masterpieces and innovative contemporary compositions, showcasing a rich musical tradition and exceptional artistry. Their collaborations with world-class musicians and commitment to cultural enrichment make them a cornerstone of the Dutch orchestral scene.
Festival Bio (NL): Grootse muziek verdient een groots podium. Het Noord Nederlands Orkest (NNO) én Concertkoor verzorgen een moshpit-proof uitvoering van het ‘Requiem’ van de Italiaanse componist Giuseppe Verdi. Dit meesterwerk uit 1874 is een mis voor de doden en ‘requiem’ is Latijn voor ‘rust’, maar het NNO maakt er een levendige boel van. Chef-irigent Eivind Gullberg Jensen weet inmiddels wel hoe hij Lowlands moet betoveren en zal niet schromen om zijn stokje op het publiek te richten. Laat je van je sokken blazen door Verdi’s klassieke kraker.
Festival Bio (EN): Grand music deserves a grand stage. The North Netherlands Orchestra (NNO) and Concert Choir deliver a moshpit-proof performance of the 'Requiem' by Italian composer Giuseppe Verdi. This 1874 masterpiece is a mass for the dead, and 'requiem' is Latin for 'rest,' but the NNO turns it into a lively affair. Chief conductor Eivind Gullberg Jensen knows exactly how to enchant Lowlands and won't hesitate to aim his baton at the audience. Let Verdi's classical banger blow you away.

Tagline: Dutch singer-songwriter blending emotional vulnerability with experimental pop and hip-hop influences.
Bio: S10, born Stien den Hollander, is a Dutch singer and rapper known for her deeply personal lyrics and genre-blending sound that combines pop and hip-hop. She represented the Netherlands in the Eurovision Song Contest 2022 with the song 'De Diepte,' which earned critical acclaim for its emotional depth and authenticity.
AI Summary: S10's music is characterized by its raw emotional honesty, blending introspective lyrics with a mix of pop and hip-hop elements. Her performance at Eurovision 2022 showcased her ability to connect with audiences through heartfelt storytelling and innovative production.
Festival Bio (NL): De Nederlandse kwaliteitsmuziek is tegenwoordig a woman’s game. En S10 (Stien den Hollander) is een topvrouw in dit spel. Die status bereikte ze door radicaal zichzelf te zijn, en daarin is ze uniek. Haar stemgeluid, timing, teksten en muziek hebben haar op deze uitzonderlijke plek gebracht. Ondanks alles wat ze voor haar kiezen kreeg, maar dat is ‘de leven’. En zij weet als geen ander dat dit de leven is. S10 gaat door, met muziek als belangrijkste medicijn. En die apotheek delen we met haar.
Festival Bio (EN): Dutch quality music is nowadays a woman’s game. And S10 (Stien den Hollander) is a leading figure in this realm. She achieved this status by being radically herself, and in that, she is unique. Her voice, timing, lyrics, and music have brought her to this exceptional position. Despite everything life has thrown at her, but that’s "the life." And she knows better than anyone that this is the life. S10 keeps going, with music as her most important medicine. And she shares that pharmacy with us.

Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Born in Slovakia, learning English at a young age and with an above-average interest in pop culture, Adéla Jergová sets her career path towards Los Angeles to study music and launch her debut single, 'Homewrecked.' A successful move: Christina Aguilera makes a cameo in the 'Sex On The Beat' video, and Demi Lovato takes this bundle of talent on tour. But the biggest recommendation lies in her charming, bouncing dance-pop style with robust synths, sung with a smooth voice and visually enhanced by agile choreography. ADÉLA, a successor in the Madonna-Lady Gaga lineage? Quite possibly!
Festival Bio (NL): Geboren in Slowakije, al jong Engels geleerd en bovengemiddeld geïnteresseerd in popcultuur, zet Adéla Jergová de loopbaanrouteplanner op Los Angeles, om daar muziek te studeren en haar debuutsingle ‘Homewrecked’ te lanceren. Een geslaagde move: Christina Aguilera doet een cameo in de ‘Sex On The Beat’-clip, en Demi Lovato neemt het brok talent mee op tour. Maar de grootste aanbeveling zit ’m in haar charmante, stuiterende dancepopsaus met robuuste synths, bezongen met soepele stem en visueel versterkt door lenige choreografie. ADÉLA, troonopvolger in de Madonna-Lady Gaga-lijn? Zou zomaar kunnen!
Festival Bio (EN): Born in Slovakia, learning English at a young age and with an above-average interest in pop culture, Adéla Jergová sets her career path towards Los Angeles to study music and launch her debut single, 'Homewrecked.' A successful move: Christina Aguilera makes a cameo in the 'Sex On The Beat' video, and Demi Lovato takes this bundle of talent on tour. But the biggest recommendation lies in her charming, bouncing dance-pop style with robust synths, sung with a smooth voice and visually enhanced by agile choreography. ADÉLA, a successor in the Madonna-Lady Gaga lineage? Quite possibly!

Tagline: Pioneers of the global kuduro movement, blending Angolan rhythms with electronic beats.
Bio: Buraka Som Sistema was a Portuguese electronic music group that revolutionized the global dance scene by popularizing kuduro, a genre that fuses Angolan rhythms with modern electronic music. Known for their high-energy performances and hits like 'Kalemba (Wegue Wegue),' they gained international acclaim and won an MTV Europe Music Award in 2008.
AI Summary: Buraka Som Sistema's innovative fusion of Angolan kuduro with electronic music brought a fresh, high-energy sound to the global dance scene. Their ability to blend traditional rhythms with cutting-edge production earned them critical acclaim and a dedicated international following.
Festival Bio (NL): Bliksem duurt niet lang. Dat zal de reden zijn dat Buraka Som Sistema (BSS), met thuisbasis in Lissabon, ruim tien jaar geleden na drie albums de stekker eruit trok. Want wat stuiterde de Portugese muziekgroep flitsend en vonkend over het podium; publiek en band moesten even flink op adem komen. Goed nieuws: het soundsystem dat Angolese kuduro doorspekt met elektronica is weer opgeladen. 2026 is het comebackjaar van BSS. En dus ook van hun zonovergoten sound: een afrofuturistische mix van zouk, techno, drum-’n-bass, soca en breakbeat.
Festival Bio (EN): Lightning doesn’t last long. That might be the reason why Buraka Som Sistema (BSS), based in Lisbon, pulled the plug over ten years ago after three albums. Because how the Portuguese music group bounced and sparked across the stage; both the audience and the band needed to catch their breath. Good news: the sound system that blends Angolan kuduro with electronics is recharged. 2026 marks the comeback year for BSS. And with it, their sun-drenched sound: an Afrofuturistic mix of zouk, techno, drum-’n-bass, soca, and breakbeat.

Tagline: Indie rock with a neofolk signature, blending soaring falsettos and unparalleled vibrato.
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Debut 'Blizzard' appeared in 2025, just too late for the end-of-year lists. Dove Ellis probably didn’t mind, as the Irishman isn’t one for the spotlight—except when it’s hanging above a stage. Intimate, impressive performances in London and his new home base of Manchester earned him the opening spot during the U.S. tour of genre peers Geese. Are you a fan of Jeff Buckley’s soaring falsetto or Thom Yorke’s unparalleled vibrato? Then the indie rock with a neofolk signature of Dove Ellis is sure to evoke warm feelings in you.
AI Summary: Dove Ellis delivers a captivating blend of indie rock and neofolk, characterized by soaring falsettos and vibrato reminiscent of Jeff Buckley and Thom Yorke. His intimate performances in London and Manchester have earned critical acclaim, including an opening spot for Geese on their U.S. tour.
Festival Bio (NL): Debuut ‘Blizzard’ verscheen in 2025 nét te laat voor de eindejaarslijstjes. Waarschijnlijk vond Dove Ellis dat wel best, want de Ier heeft niet veel met spotlights. Behalve dan als ze boven een podium hangen. Intieme, indrukwekkende optredens in Londen en nieuwe thuisbasis Manchester brachten hem de openingsspot tijdens de Amerikaanse tour van genregenoten Geese. Hou je van de hogere kopstemkunst van Jeff Buckley en het ongeëvenaarde vibrato van Thom Yorke? Dan roept de indierock met neofolk-handtekening van Dove Ellis geheid warme gevoelens bij je op.
Festival Bio (EN): Debut 'Blizzard' appeared in 2025, just too late for the end-of-year lists. Dove Ellis probably didn’t mind, as the Irishman isn’t one for the spotlight—except when it’s hanging above a stage. Intimate, impressive performances in London and his new home base of Manchester earned him the opening spot during the U.S. tour of genre peers Geese. Are you a fan of Jeff Buckley’s soaring falsetto or Thom Yorke’s unparalleled vibrato? Then the indie rock with a neofolk signature of Dove Ellis is sure to evoke warm feelings in you.

Tagline: Laid-back indie house with catchy pop hooks and a gritty rock edge.
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] What happens when a group of seasoned indie rockers change course and embark on a time-travel journey through electronic music, fueling up on house, dubstep, trip-hop, hip-hop, and breakbeat along the way? Exactly: a party. For Fcukers, these are all puzzle pieces that fit together seamlessly, as proven by bangers like ‘Play Me’ and ‘Homie Don’t Shake.’ The New York outfit—originally a trio, now a duo—was quickly signed by Ninja Tune's sublabel Technicolour, solidifying the retro sound of today: laid-back indie house with catchy pop hooks and a gritty rock edge.
AI Summary: Fcukers blend their indie rock roots with a diverse array of electronic genres, including house, dubstep, trip-hop, and breakbeat, creating a unique sound that combines laid-back indie house with pop sensibilities and a raw rock attitude. Their tracks like 'Play Me' and 'Homie Don’t Shake' showcase their ability to seamlessly integrate these influences, earning them a spot on Ninja Tune's Technicolour label.
Festival Bio (NL): Wat als een stel ervaren indierockers het roer omgooien en op tijdreis gaan door de elektronica om onderweg house, dubstep, triphop, hiphop en breakbeat te tanken? Precies: party. Voor Fcukers zijn het allemaal puzzelstukjes die naadloos in elkaar passen, zo bewijzen knallers als ‘Play Me’ en ‘Homie Don’t Shake’. Het New Yorkse gezelschap – eerst een trio, nu een duo – werd snel vastgelegd door Ninja Tunes sublabel Technicolour en bevestigt van daaruit de retrosound van nu: nonchalante indiehouse met pakkende pophooks en een rafelend rockrandje.
Festival Bio (EN): What happens when a group of seasoned indie rockers change course and embark on a time-travel journey through electronic music, fueling up on house, dubstep, trip-hop, hip-hop, and breakbeat along the way? Exactly: a party. For Fcukers, these are all puzzle pieces that fit together seamlessly, as proven by bangers like ‘Play Me’ and ‘Homie Don’t Shake.’ The New York outfit—originally a trio, now a duo—was quickly signed by Ninja Tune's sublabel Technicolour, solidifying the retro sound of today: laid-back indie house with catchy pop hooks and a gritty rock edge.

Tagline: A pioneering electronic artist blending jazz, classical, and experimental sounds into immersive live performances.
Bio: Floating Points is the project of Sam Shepherd, a UK-based electronic producer and composer known for his innovative fusion of electronic music with jazz, classical, and ambient influences. His live performances often feature a full band and are celebrated for their dynamic, immersive quality.
AI Summary: Floating Points stands out for his genre-defying approach, seamlessly integrating electronic production with jazz improvisation and classical arrangements. His live shows, often featuring a full ensemble, are critically acclaimed for their rich textures and emotional depth.
Festival Bio (NL): Vissers zullen aan een dobber denken, maar bij het zien van de woorden ‘Floating Points’ weten festivalgangers dat ze beet hebben. Sam Shepherd drijft tussen ballet en Berghain. Vastpinnen is onmogelijk. Toch kwam de Britse neurowetenschapper met het album ‘Cascade’ terug op de dansvloer. Het Floating Points-stempel op een clubnacht bestaat uit echo’s van vintage electro, Moroder, acid en breakbeat. Sheperd staat erom bekend dat hij live nauwgezet muzikale blokjes op elkaar legt en zo zijn publiek naar de ultieme ervaring stuwt. Uiteindelijk komt de euforie bovendrijven.
Festival Bio (EN): Fishermen might think of a float, but when festival-goers see the words 'Floating Points,' they know they've struck gold. Sam Shepherd drifts between ballet and Berghain. Pinning him down is impossible. Yet, the British neuroscientist returned to the dance floor with the album 'Cascade.' The Floating Points stamp on a club night consists of echoes of vintage electro, Moroder, acid, and breakbeat. Shepherd is known for meticulously layering musical blocks live, pushing his audience toward the ultimate experience. In the end, euphoria rises to the surface.

Tagline: Hip-hop and punk collide with raw anger and Amsterdam roots, creating music that’s both vital and electrifying.
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Sef and Abel joined their talented forces in 2024 to become an unexpected festival sensation. They are the voices of a generation, and as IJSLAND, they show what that sounds like. "They’re going to do it, save the whole world from people like them," they already sang. Hip-hop, punk, Amsterdam, and genuine anger come together on Faisal's beats. Music that’s not only important but also insanely good. Low and IJS obviously have something in common, and we’re going to seal that once more.
AI Summary: IJSLAND is a dynamic duo blending the raw energy of punk with the rhythmic intensity of hip-hop, driven by Faisal's powerful beats and fueled by a sense of genuine anger and urgency. Emerging from Amsterdam in 2024, Sef and Abel have quickly become a festival sensation, delivering music that is both socially significant and sonically captivating.
Festival Bio (NL): Sef en Abel sloegen de getalenteerde handen in 2024 al ineen om een onverwachte festivalsensatie te worden. Ze zijn de stemmen van een generatie, en als IJSLAND laten ze horen hoe dat klinkt. Zij gaan het doen, de hele wereld redden van mensen zoals zij, zongen ze al. Hiphop, punk, Amsterdam en oprechte woede komen samen op beats van Faisal. Muziek die niet alleen belangrijk is, maar ook retegoed. Low en IJS hebben uiteraard iets gemeen en dat we gaan nog een keer bezegelen.
Festival Bio (EN): Sef and Abel joined their talented forces in 2024 to become an unexpected festival sensation. They are the voices of a generation, and as IJSLAND, they show what that sounds like. "They’re going to do it, save the whole world from people like them," they already sang. Hip-hop, punk, Amsterdam, and genuine anger come together on Faisal's beats. Music that’s not only important but also insanely good. Low and IJS obviously have something in common, and we’re going to seal that once more.

Tagline: A genre-defying artist blending experimental hip-hop with sharp political commentary and innovative production.
Bio: JPEGMAFIA, also known as Peggy, is an American rapper, producer, and songwriter known for his experimental approach to hip-hop, blending abrasive beats, eclectic samples, and politically charged lyrics. He has gained critical acclaim for albums like 'Veteran' (2018) and 'All My Heroes Are Cornballs' (2019), which showcase his unique sound and boundary-pushing artistry.
AI Summary: JPEGMAFIA's music combines raw, confrontational lyrics with experimental production that incorporates elements of industrial, punk, and electronic music. His work is celebrated for its innovation, unfiltered social commentary, and ability to challenge traditional hip-hop norms.
Festival Bio (NL): Zijn naam is al even eigenzinnig als zijn muziek: voor JPEGMAFIA (koosnaam: Peggy) geen boombap of jazzrap, om wat knusse hiphopdwarsstraten te noemen. De New Yorker van Jamaicaanse origine doet het met noise, trap, industrial, metalgitaarriffs en experimentele songstructuren, als je überhaupt al van songs kunt spreken. Eerder levert de als Barrington Hendricks ter wereld gekomen rapper al vijf albums lang een soort muzikale stream of consciousness af, ook qua lyrics. Hyperkinetisch over het voetlicht gestuiterd, zowel mét als zonder liveband een echte original gangster.
Festival Bio (EN): His name is as unconventional as his music: for JPEGMAFIA (nickname: Peggy), no boom bap or jazz rap, to name some cozy hip-hop side streets. The New Yorker of Jamaican descent does it with noise, trap, industrial, metal guitar riffs, and experimental song structures—if you can even call them songs. The rapper, born as Barrington Hendricks, has already delivered a kind of musical stream of consciousness over the course of five albums, both in terms of sound and lyrics. Hyperkinetically bouncing across the stage, both with and without a live band, a true original gangster.

Tagline: A genre-blurring collective crafting lush, soulful grooves with a laid-back vibe.
Bio: LEISURE is a New Zealand-based music collective known for their smooth blend of indie pop, funk, and soul. Since their formation in 2015, they have gained a global following for their relaxed, groove-driven sound and standout tracks like 'Got It Bad' and 'All Over You.'
AI Summary: LEISURE combines elements of indie pop, funk, and soul to create a signature sound characterized by mellow grooves, lush instrumentation, and dreamy vocals. Their music has been praised for its effortless blend of retro and modern influences, making them a standout act in the global indie scene.
Festival Bio (NL): Loungerock, slaapkamerfunk, zonsondergangspop, chillsoul of avondstranddisco: wat er ook uit LEISURE’s geoliede machine rolt, het resultaat is altijd een muzikaal perfect in elkaar gestoken, ontspannen geheel om op weg te dromen. De band uit Nieuw-Zeeland houdt daarmee een reputatie in stand dat daaronder in het zuidelijk halfrond de ultieme bron ligt van dromerige pop en rock van boterzachte topkwaliteit. Het vorig jaar uitgekomen vijfde mijmeralbum ‘Welcome to the Mood’ bevestigt dat de steeds evoluerende verkenningstocht van LEISURE nog lang niet is afgelopen. Volgende stop: Lowlands.
Festival Bio (EN): Loungerock, bedroom funk, sunset pop, chill soul, or evening beach disco: whatever comes out of LEISURE's well-oiled machine, the result is always a perfectly crafted, relaxed musical whole to dream away to. The band from New Zealand upholds a reputation that the ultimate source of dreamy pop and rock of buttery smooth top quality lies down there in the southern hemisphere. Last year's fifth contemplative album, 'Welcome to the Mood,' confirms that LEISURE's ever-evolving exploration is far from over. Next stop: Lowlands.

Tagline: Amsterdam's nonchalant fashion-forward rapper with a raw, trendy sound.
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Rappers need to drip. And Milo knows exactly how to do that. Over pounding 808s, the flamboyant young man flexes about his pricey designer clothing, making it sound as if this hip-hop star is friends with every store owner on P.C. Hooftstraat. That bragging has to be earned, and this true Amsterdammer does so with his delightfully nonchalant flow. Even the biggest fashion rappers from America could take notes. His stage name says it all: Milo succeeds like no other in delivering trendy, raw, and outrageously expensive Dutch rap.
AI Summary: Milolaathetlukken is an Amsterdam-based rapper who combines pounding 808s with a nonchalant flow, delivering a unique blend of trendy and raw Dutch rap. His lyrics focus on high-end fashion and luxury, positioning him as a confident and flamboyant figure in the hip-hop scene. His style and delivery could rival some of the biggest names in fashion-focused rap.
Festival Bio (NL): Rappers moeten drippen. En Milo weet heel goed hoe je dat doet. Over snoeiharde 808s flext de flamboyante jongeman over zijn kostbare designerkleding, waardoor het klinkt alsof deze hiphopster bevriend is met iedere winkeleigenaar op de P.C. Hooftstraat. Die opschepperij moet je natuurlijk verdienen, wat deze ras-Amsterdammer doet met zijn heerlijk nonchalante flow. Zelfs de grootste fashionrappers uit Amerika kunnen er een puntje aan zuigen. Zijn artiestennaam zegt het al: Milo lukt het als geen ander om hippe, rauwe en peperdure Nederrap neer te zetten.
Festival Bio (EN): Rappers need to drip. And Milo knows exactly how to do that. Over pounding 808s, the flamboyant young man flexes about his pricey designer clothing, making it sound as if this hip-hop star is friends with every store owner on P.C. Hooftstraat. That bragging has to be earned, and this true Amsterdammer does so with his delightfully nonchalant flow. Even the biggest fashion rappers from America could take notes. His stage name says it all: Milo succeeds like no other in delivering trendy, raw, and outrageously expensive Dutch rap.

Tagline: Blending vintage funk, disco, and world music influences with a modern groove.
Bio: Nu Genea Live Band is an Italian collective known for their vibrant fusion of 70s-inspired funk, disco, and global music traditions, creating a unique and danceable sound. Their live performances are celebrated for their energy and musicianship, featuring a mix of electronic and organic instrumentation.
AI Summary: Nu Genea Live Band combines retro funk and disco grooves with influences from world music, delivering a fresh and eclectic sound that captivates audiences. Their live shows are dynamic and immersive, showcasing a seamless blend of electronic beats and live instrumentation.
Festival Bio (NL): Waan je op de zonovergoten stranden rondom Napels en proef de rijke muzikale geschiedenis van de havenstad aan de voet van de Vesuvius. Dat is de belofte van Nu Genea Live Band, het geesteskind van Massimo Di Lena en Lucio Aquilina die mediterrane invloeden door laten drenken in wulpse funk en zomerse soul. Het smaakvolle resultaat barst van de creatieve ideeën, een experimenteerdrift die is te herleiden naar hun samenwerkingen met de gerenommeerde afrobeat-drummer Tony Allen, die in de jaren zeventig de percussie voor Fela Kuti verzorgde.
Festival Bio (EN): Imagine yourself on the sun-drenched beaches around Naples and savor the rich musical history of the port city at the foot of Mount Vesuvius. That is the promise of Nu Genea Live Band, the brainchild of Massimo Di Lena and Lucio Aquilina, who infuse Mediterranean influences into sultry funk and summery soul. The tasteful result overflows with creative ideas, a spirit of experimentation that can be traced back to their collaborations with the renowned Afrobeat drummer Tony Allen, who provided percussion for Fela Kuti in the 1970s.

Tagline: A soulful blend of retro-inspired melodies and heartfelt storytelling, delivered with a unique falsetto voice.
Bio: Pale Jay is a singer-songwriter and producer known for his retro-inspired soul and R&B sound, characterized by smooth falsetto vocals and lush, vintage-style production. His music often explores themes of love and vulnerability, resonating with fans of timeless, emotive songwriting.
AI Summary: Pale Jay's music combines classic soul and R&B influences with a modern sensibility, showcasing his distinct falsetto and a knack for crafting emotionally rich, nostalgic tracks. His sound appeals to fans of artists like Leon Bridges and Sam Cooke, blending vintage aesthetics with contemporary production.
Festival Bio (NL): Afkomst, leeftijd, schoenmaat, favoriete gerecht: vrijwel onvindbaar als het om Pale Jay gaat. Maar wat moeten we met die feitenbrij als zijn muziek zó veel te zeggen heeft? Zij die het mysterie al live zagen kunnen dat bevestigen: die weergaloze kopstem, bevlogen én breekbaar. En daarachter zijn band die vertrouwde geluiden uit de soulhoogtijdagen van hedendaagse allure voorziet. Afsluitend nog een persoonlijke boodschap van deze muzikale Banksy: ‘The mask is red, the songs are blue. You don't know Pale Jay, but Pale Jay loves you.’
Festival Bio (EN): Origin, age, shoe size, favorite dish: nearly impossible to find when it comes to Pale Jay. But what do we need with that jumble of facts when his music has so much to say? Those who have already witnessed the mystery live can confirm it: that unparalleled falsetto, passionate yet fragile. And behind it, his band, infusing familiar sounds from soul's golden era with contemporary flair. Concluding with a personal message from this musical Banksy: "The mask is red, the songs are blue. You don't know Pale Jay, but Pale Jay loves you."

Tagline: A genre-blending R&B artist known for her ethereal vocals and futuristic soundscapes.
Bio: Ravyn Lenae is an American singer-songwriter from Chicago, known for her unique blend of R&B, soul, and experimental sounds. She gained recognition with her EPs, including 'Crush' produced by Steve Lacy, and her debut album 'Hypnos' has been praised for its innovative production and her captivating vocal style.
AI Summary: Ravyn Lenae's music combines lush, dreamy R&B with experimental production and introspective lyrics. Her collaborations with artists like Steve Lacy showcase her ability to push the boundaries of the genre while maintaining a soulful core.
Festival Bio (NL): Kan de zoetheid van vroegere soul en girl groups samengaan met de expliciete aard van moderne R&B en pop? Hier is de superster die de perfecte balans levert: Ravyn Lenae. Superster ja, want de singer-songwriter uit Chicago pakt honderden miljoenen streams met haar sensuele neo-soul en alt-R&B. Middels haar verleidelijke sopraan hangt ze haar romantische vuile was buiten en roept ze grootheden op uit vervlogen tijden, terwijl producers als KAYTRANADA en Steve Lacy haar muziek verankeren in het nu.
Festival Bio (EN): Can the sweetness of early soul and girl groups blend with the explicit nature of modern R&B and pop? Here is the superstar who delivers the perfect balance: Ravyn Lenae. Superstar indeed, as the Chicago singer-songwriter garners hundreds of millions of streams with her sensual neo-soul and alt-R&B. Through her alluring soprano, she airs her romantic dirty laundry and evokes legends of bygone eras, while producers like KAYTRANADA and Steve Lacy anchor her music firmly in the present.

Tagline: Pioneering techno artist blending innovative soundscapes with cutting-edge technology.
Bio: Richie Hawtin, also known as Plastikman, is a Canadian-born electronic music producer and DJ renowned for his contributions to the minimal techno genre. He is celebrated for his innovative use of technology in live performances and his influential role in shaping the global electronic music scene.
AI Summary: Richie Hawtin's mastery of minimal techno and his groundbreaking use of technology in music production and live sets have solidified his status as a pioneer in electronic music. His ability to push the boundaries of sound design and performance continues to inspire both fans and fellow artists.
Festival Bio (NL): In het geval van de Brits-Canadese Richie Hawtin schiet het woord ‘pionier’ tekort: de technolegende achter aliassen als Plastikman en F.U.S.E. staat al ruim dertig jaar bekend als dé voortstuwende kracht binnen de underground dance. Met zijn nieuwste A/V show ‘DEF EFX X0X’ laat hij een overweldigend spektakel van licht en geluid los op het publiek. Pulserende stroboscopen dompelen je onder in een duistere clubnacht, waar Hawtin als geniale technocomponist de dansvloer weet te dirigeren. Bereid je voor op een clubnacht en levend kunstwerk ineen.
Festival Bio (EN): In the case of the British-Canadian Richie Hawtin, the word 'pioneer' falls short: the techno legend behind aliases like Plastikman and F.U.S.E. has been known for over thirty years as the driving force within underground dance. With his latest A/V show 'DEF EFX X0X,' he unleashes an overwhelming spectacle of light and sound on the audience. Pulsating strobe lights immerse you in a dark club night, where Hawtin, as a brilliant techno composer, masterfully directs the dance floor. Prepare yourself for a club night and a living work of art in one.

Tagline: A soulful voice reminiscent of Amy Winehouse, delivering heartfelt stories from South East London.
Bio: [using festival bio due to a lack of publicly available data] Reaching deep from the soul, a heartfelt sob reminiscent of Amy Winehouse: Skye Newman's voice sounds as if its owner has lived a hundred lives. The debut EP ‘SE9 Part 1’ probably wouldn’t exist without the singing aunt who introduced this budding soul queen to music as an emotional outlet. After releasing the singles ‘Hairdresser’ and ‘Family Matters,’ the South East Londoner in her twenties shared the stage with Ed Sheeran and Lewis Capaldi, and Elton John became a fan club member. Off to Biddinghuizen then, LLowgical!
AI Summary: Skye Newman blends soulful, emotionally rich vocals with pop sensibilities, drawing comparisons to Amy Winehouse. Her music reflects personal storytelling, as showcased in her debut EP 'SE9 Part 1' and singles like 'Hairdresser' and 'Family Matters.' With notable achievements such as performing alongside Ed Sheeran and Lewis Capaldi and earning praise from Elton John, she is a promising voice in the UK soul-pop scene.
Festival Bio (NL): Uithalend vanuit de tenen, een doorleefde snik à la Amy Winehouse: de stem van Skye Newman klinkt alsof de eigenaar al honderd levens heeft geleid. Debuut-ep ‘SE9 Part 1’ was er waarschijnlijk niet geweest zonder de zingende tante die deze soulqueen in de dop inwijdde in muziek als uitlaatklep. Na het uitbrengen van de singles ‘Hairdresser’ en ‘Family Matters’ deelde de twintiger uit Zuidoost-Londen het podium met Ed Sheeran en Lewis Capaldi, en werd Elton John lid van de fanclub. Op naar Biddinghuizen dus, LLowgisch!
Festival Bio (EN): Reaching deep from the soul, a heartfelt sob reminiscent of Amy Winehouse: Skye Newman's voice sounds as if its owner has lived a hundred lives.
